hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push' || exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-/home/user/social-media-bot}" || exit 0; if ! ruff format --check . ; then echo 'Push blocked: ruff format check failed. Run `ruff format .` then retry.' >&2; exit 2; fi; if ! ruff check . ; then echo 'Push blocked: ruff lint check failed. Run `ruff check --fix .` then retry.' >&2; exit 2; fi
